title: Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies:
Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies!
